mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, password_hash, role, org_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{orgId}, #{status})
INSERT INTO app_user (username, password_hash, role, org_id, status, wx_openid) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{orgId}, #{status}, #{wxOpenid})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status, wx_openid FROM app_user WHERE wx_openid = #{wxOpenid}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status, wx_openid FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status, wx_openid FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status FROM app_user WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status, wx_openid FROM app_user WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND wx_openid IS NOT NULL AND (org_id = #{orgId} OR org_id IS NULL) ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, org_id, status FROM app_user ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE role = #{role} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND status <> 'DISABLED'
